DESCRIPTION: Distribute media equipment to classrooms. Instruct professors through the application of Microsoft and Internet services. Answer phone calls and maintain an organized office for students and professors to enter freely. Performed various maintenance duties necessary to maintain and enhance the value of residential and commercial properties.
